brandEssence: A warm, steady presence when life feels heavy.
brandSpine: Quiet Ember exists to make emotional wellness feel accessible, human, and unhurried — for anyone navigating grief, anxiety, relationship strain, or the quiet weight of everyday life.
brandMantra: Feel it. Name it. Heal it.

primary.name: Ember Teal
primary.usage: Primary brand colour — logo, headings, key UI elements

brand.name: Coral
brand.usage: Warm accent — CTAs, highlights, 'Ember' in logo

neutral.name: Text Dark
neutral.usage: Headings, primary text — deep green-tinted dark

heading.usage: All headings — warm, serif elegance that feels approachable, not corporate

body.usage: Body text, UI labels — clean, readable, calm

toneOfVoice: Warm, not clinical — speak like a trusted friend who also happens to understand deeply.
Gentle, not weak — hold space without being passive or vague.
Honest, not alarming — name difficult feelings without dramatising them.
Encouraging, not prescriptive — invite people in, never push or shame.
Human, not corporate — avoid jargon, acronyms, and therapeutic distance.
Present, not hurried — the voice moves at the pace of the person reading.
Quietly confident — Quiet Ember doesn't shout; it illuminates.
brandPurpose: To create a safe, warm space where people can explore their emotional world, find support, and build the inner resilience to live a life that feels like their own. Quiet Ember believes that healing is not a destination — it is a practice, tended like an ember: quietly, consistently, with care.
brandBeliefs: Emotional wellness is not a luxury — it is a foundation
Everyone deserves to feel heard, without judgement
Healing happens at its own pace — and that is okay
Small, consistent steps create lasting change
Vulnerability is not weakness — it is the beginning of strength
brandRole: A warm, accessible emotional wellness companion — not a clinical institution, not a self-help product. Quiet Ember sits with people in the in-between: when life is neither crisis nor fine, when feelings are real but hard to name.
visualDirection: Warmth — soft creams, teal, coral and sage; nothing cold or stark
Organic shapes — rounded corners, soft shadows, gentle gradients
White space — calm, unhurried layouts that breathe
Serif headings — Playfair Display creates warmth and trustworthiness
Photography — natural light, soft textures, human moments over stock poses
brandGovernance: Every piece of content must make someone feel seen, not sold to
Never use fear or urgency as a motivator
The brand voice is consistent — warm in a social post, warm in a legal document, warm in a testimonial
